verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወቅር ፡ ለከ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ጽላተ ፡ ዘእብን ፡ በከመ ፡ ቀዳምያት ፡ ወዕረግ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወእጽሕፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቶን ፡ ጽላት ፡ ዝክተ ፡ ነገረ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቀዳምያት ፡ ጽላት ፡ እለ ፡
                  ቀጥቀጥከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Hew for thyself two tables of stone, as also the first were, and come up to me to the mountain; and I will write upon the tables the words, which were on the first tables, which thou brokest.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first: and I will write upon these tables the words that were in the first tables, which thou brakest.

verses.geez: ወኩን ፡ ድልወ ፡ ለነግህ ፡ ወተዐርግ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሲና ፡ ወቁመኒ ፡ ህየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And be ready by the morning, and thou shalt go up to the mount Sina, and shalt stand there for me on the top of the mountain.
translations.kjv: And be ready in the morning, and come up in the morning unto mount Sinai, and present thyself there to me in the top of the mount.

verses.geez:
ወአልቦ ፡ ዘየዐርግ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘየሀሉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ደብሩ ፡ ወአባግዕኒ ፡ ወአልህምትኒ ፡ ኢይትረዐዩ
                  ፡ ቅሩቦ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And let no one go up with thee, nor be seen in all the mountain; and let not the sheep and oxen feed near that mountain.
translations.kjv: And no man shall come up with thee, neither let any man be seen throughout all the mount; neither let the flocks nor herds feed before that mount.

verses.geez:
ወወቀረ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ጽላተ ፡ እለ ፡ እብን ፡ በከመ ፡ ቀዳምያት ፡ ወጌሠ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወዐርገ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ደብረ ፡ ሲና ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ እልክተ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ጽላተ ፡ እለ ፡ እብን ።

translations.lxx: And Moses hewed two tables of stone, as also the first were; and Moses having arisen early, went up to the mount Sina, as the Lord appointed him; and Moses took the two tables of stone.
translations.kjv: And he hewed two tables of stone like unto the first; and Moses rose up early in the morning, and went up unto mount Sinai, as the LORD had commanded him, and took in his hand the two tables of stone.

verses.geez: ወወረደ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በደመና ፡ ወቆመ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወጸወዐ ፡ በስመ ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord descended in a cloud, and stood near him there, and called by the name of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the LORD descended in the cloud, and stood with him there, and proclaimed the name of the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወኀለፈ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ወስምየ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ መሓሪ ፡ ወመስተሣህል ፡ ርኁቀ ፡
                  መዐት ፡ ወብዙኀ ፡ ምሕረት ፡ ወጻድቅ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord passed by before his face, and proclaimed, The Lord God, pitiful and merciful, longsuffering and very compassionate, and true,
translations.kjv: And the LORD passed by before him, and proclaimed, The LORD, The LORD God, merciful and gracious, longsuffering, and abundant in goodness and truth,

verses.geez:
ዘየዐቅባ ፡ ለጽድቅ ፡ ወይገብር ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አእላፍ ፡ ዘያሴስል ፡ ዐመፃ ፡ ወጌጋየ ፡ ወኀጢአተ ፡ ወለመአብስ
                  ፡ ኢያነጽሖ ፡ ዘያገብእ ፡ ኀጣውአ ፡ አበው ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ውሉድ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ ውሉድ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሣልስት ፡ ወራብዕት ፡
                  ትውልድ ።

translations.lxx: and keeping justice and mercy for thousands, taking away iniquity, and unrighteousness, and sins; and he will not clear the guilty; bringing the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and to the children's children, to the third and fourth generation.
translations.kjv: Keeping mercy for thousands, forgiving iniquity and transgression and sin, and that will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the children’s children, unto the third and to the fourth generation.

verses.geez: ወጐጕአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወደነነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወሰገደ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses hasted, and bowed to the earth and worshipped;
translations.kjv: And Moses made haste, and bowed his head toward the earth, and worshipped.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በቅድሜከ ፡ ይሑር ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡
                  ጽኑዐ ፡ ክሳድ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወተኀድግ ፡ አንተ ፡ ኀጣውኦ ፡ ወአበሳሁ ፡ ለሕዝብከ ፡ ወንከውን ፡ ለከ ።

translations.lxx: and said, If I have found grace before thee, let my Lord go with us; for the people is stiff-necked: and thou shalt take away our sins and our iniquities, and we will be thine.
translations.kjv: And he said, If now I have found grace in thy sight, O LORD, let my LORD, I pray thee, go among us; for it is a stiffnecked people; and pardon our iniquity and our sin, and take us for thine inheritance.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ እሠይም ፡ ለከ ፡ ኪዳነ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ወእግብር ፡
                  ዐቢያተ ፡ ወክቡራተ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ ወይሬኢ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ለእለ ፡
                  ውስቴቶሙ ፡ ሀሎከ ፡ ግብሩ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ መድምም ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እገብር ፡ ለከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Behold, I establish a covenant for thee in the presence of all thy people; I will do glorious things, which have not been done in all the earth, or in any nation; and all the people among whom thou art shall see the works of the Lord, that they are wonderful, which I will do for thee.
translations.kjv: And he said, Behold, I make a covenant: before all thy people I will do marvels, such as have not been done in all the earth, nor in any nation: and all the people among which thou art shall see the work of the LORD: for it is a terrible thing that I will do with thee.

verses.geez:
ወዑቅ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ አንተ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እኤዝዘከ ፡ ናህ ፡ አነ ፡ ኣወፅኦሙ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡ ለአሞሬዎን ፡
                  ወለከናኔዎን ፡ ወለኬጤዎን ፡ ወለፌሬዜዎን ፡ ወለሔዌዎን ፡ ወለ[ኢ]ያቡሴዎን ።

translations.lxx: Do thou take heed to all things whatsoever I command thee: behold, I cast out before your face the Amorite and the Chananite and the Pherezite, and the Chettite, and Evite, and Gergesite and Jebusite:
translations.kjv: Observe thou that which I command thee this day: behold, I drive out before thee the Amorite, and the Canaanite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Hivite, and the Jebusite.

verses.geez:
ዑቅ ፡ እንከ ፡ ርእሰከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትትማሐሉ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ እለ ፡ ይተርፉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ትበውኡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይኩን ፡ ጌጋይ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: take heed to thyself, lest at any time thou make a covenant with the dwellers on the land, into which thou art entering, lest it be to thee a stumbling-block among you.
translations.kjv: Take heed to thyself, lest thou make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land whither thou goest, lest it be for a snare in the midst of thee:

verses.geez: ምሥዋዓቲሆሙ ፡ ትነሥቱ ፡ ወምሰሊሆሙ ፡ ትሴበሩ ፡ ወአእዋሞሙ ፡ ትገዝሙ ፡ ወግልፎ ፡ አማልክቲሆሙ ፡ ታውዕዩ ፡ በእሳት ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall destroy their altars, and break in pieces their pillars, and ye shall cut down their groves, and the graven images of their gods ye shall burn with fire.
translations.kjv: But ye shall destroy their altars, break their images, and cut down their groves:

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ኢትሰግዱ ፡ ለካልእ ፡ አምላክ ፡ እስመ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቀናጺ ፡ ስሙ ፡ ወእግዚአብሔርሰ ፡ ቀናኢ ፡
                  ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: For ye shall not worship strange gods, for the Lord God, a jealous name, is a jealous God;
translations.kjv: For thou shalt worship no other god: for the LORD, whose name is Jealous, is a jealous God:

verses.geez:
ዮጊ ፡ ትትማሐል ፡ ምስለ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወይዜምዉ ፡ ድኅረ ፡ አማልክቲሆሙ ፡ ወይሠውዑ
                  ፡ ለአማልክቲሆሙ ፡ ወይጼውዑከ ፡ ወትበልዕ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: lest at any time thou make a covenant with the dwellers on the land, and they go a whoring after their gods, and sacrifice to their gods, and they call thee, and thou shouldest eat of their feasts,
translations.kjv: Lest thou make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land, and they go a whoring after their gods, and do sacrifice unto their gods, and one call thee, and thou eat of his sacrifice;

verses.geez:
ወትነሥእ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አዋልዲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቅከ ፡ ወአዋልዲከ ፡ ትሁብ ፡ ለደቂቆሙ ፡ ወይዜምዋ ፡ አዋልዲከ ፡ ድኅረ ፡
                  አማልክቲሆሙ ፡ ወያዜምውዎሙ ፡ ለደቂቅከ ፡ ድኅረ ፡ አማልክቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and thou shouldest take of their daughters to thy sons, and thou shouldest give of thy daughters to their sons; and thy daughters should go a whoring after their gods, and thy sons should go a whoring after their gods.
translations.kjv: And thou take of their daughters unto thy sons, and their daughters go a whoring after their gods, and make thy sons go a whoring after their gods.

verses.geez: ወአማልክተ ፡ ዘስብኮ ፡ ኢትግበር ፡ ለከ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt not make to thyself molten gods.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt make thee no molten gods.

verses.geez:
ወሕገ ፡ ናእት ፡ ዕቀብ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ብላዕ ፡ ናእተ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዝኩከ ፡ በዘመኑ ፡ በወርኀ ፡ ሚያዝያ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ በወርኀ ፡ ሚያዝያ ፡ ወፃእከ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt keep the feast of unleavened bread: seven days shalt thou eat unleavened bread, as I have charged thee, at the season in the month of new corn; for in the month of new corn thou camest out from Egypt.
translations.kjv: The feast of unleavened bread shalt thou keep. Seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread, as I commanded thee, in the time of the month Abib: for in the month Abib thou camest out from Egypt.

verses.geez: ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕት ፡ ዘይፈትሕ ፡ ማኅፀነ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ለላህም ፡ ወበኵሩ ፡ ለበግዕ ።

translations.lxx: The males are mine, everything that opens the womb; every first-born of oxen, and every first-born of sheep.
translations.kjv: All that openeth the matrix is mine; and every firstling among thy cattle, whether ox or sheep, that is male.

verses.geez:
ወበኵሩ ፡ ለአድግ ፡ ወትቤዝዎ ፡ በበግዕ ፡ ወእመሰ ፡ ኢቤዘውካሁ ፡ ሤጦ ፡ ትሁብ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ በኵረ ፡ ውሉድከ ፡ ትቤዙ
                  ፡ ወኢታስተርኢ ፡ ቅድሜየ ፡ ዕራቅከ ።

translations.lxx: And the first-born of an ass thou shalt redeem with a sheep, and if thou wilt not redeem it thou shalt pay a price: every first-born of thy sons shalt thou redeem: thou shalt not appear before me empty.
translations.kjv: But the firstling of an ass thou shalt redeem with a lamb: and if thou redeem him not, then shalt thou break his neck. All the firstborn of thy sons thou shalt redeem. And none shall appear before me empty.

verses.geez: ሰዱሰ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ግብረከ ፡ ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ታዐርፍ ፡ ታዐርፍ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ወታዐርፍ ፡ ዐፂደ ።

translations.lxx: Six days thou shalt work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest: there shall be rest in seed-time and harvest.
translations.kjv: Six days thou shalt work, but on the seventh day thou shalt rest: in earing time and in harvest thou shalt rest.

verses.geez: ወበዓለ ፡ ሰንበት ፡ ትገብር ፡ ሊተ ፡ አመ ፡ ይቀድሙ ፡ ዐፂደ ፡ ስርናይ ፡ ወበዓለ ፡ ምኵራብ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt keep to me the feast of weeks, the beginning of wheat-harvest; and the feast of ingathering in the middle of the year.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt observe the feast of weeks, of the firstfruits of wheat harvest, and the feast of ingathering at the year’s end.

verses.geez: ሠለስተ ፡ ዘመነ ፡ ለዓመት ፡ ያስተርኢ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕትከ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: Three times in the year shall every male of thine appear before the Lord the God of Israel.
translations.kjv: Thrice in the year shall all your menchildren appear before the LORD God, the God of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ አወፅኦሙ ፡ ለአሕዛብ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽከ ፡ ወእሰፍሖ ፡ ለአድዋሊከ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘይፈትዋ ፡ መኑሂ ፡ ለምድርከ
                  ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ተዐርግ ፡ ታስተርኢ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ሠለስተ ፡ ዘመነ ፡ ለዓመት ።

translations.lxx: For when I shall have cast out the nations before thy face, and shall have enlarged thy coasts, no one shall desire thy land, whenever thou mayest go up to appear before the Lord thy God, three times in the year.
translations.kjv: For I will cast out the nations before thee, and enlarge thy borders: neither shall any man desire thy land, when thou shalt go up to appear before the LORD thy God thrice in the year.

verses.geez: ኢትዝባሕ ፡ ብሑአ ፡ ደም ፡ መሥዋዕትየ ፡ ወኢይቢት ፡ ለነግህ ፡ [ዘዘብሑ ፡] ለበዓለ ፡ ፋሲካ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt not offer the blood of my sacrifices with leaven, neither shall the sacrifices of the feast of the passover remain till the morning.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt not offer the blood of my sacrifice with leaven; neither shall the sacrifice of the feast of the passover be left unto the morning.

verses.geez:
ቀዳሜ ፡ እክለ ፡ ምድርከ ፡ ትወስድ ፡ ቤተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፤ ወኢታብስል ፡ በግዐ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይጠቡ ፡ ሐሊበ
                  ፡ እሙ ።

translations.lxx: The first-fruits of thy land shalt thou put into the house of the Lord thy God: thou shalt not boil a lamb in his mother's milk.
translations.kjv: The first of the firstfruits of thy land thou shalt bring unto the house of the LORD thy God. Thou shalt not seethe a kid in his mother’s milk.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ጸሐፍ ፡ ለከ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ፡ [እስመ ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡] ኣቀውም ፡ ለከ ፡
                  ኪዳነ ፡ ወለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Write these words for thyself, for on these words I have established a covenant with thee and with Israel.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Write thou these words: for after the tenor of these words I have made a covenant with thee and with Israel.

verses.geez:
ወሀሎ ፡ ህየ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ፵ዕለተ ፡ ወ፵ሌሊተ ፤ እክለ ፡ ኢበልዐ ፡ ወማየ ፡ ኢሰትየ ፡ ወጸሐፈ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ጽላት ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ፡ ፲ቃለ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses was there before the Lord forty days, and forty nights; he did not eat bread, and he did not drink water; and he wrote upon the tables these words of the covenant, the ten sayings.
translations.kjv: And he was there with the LORD forty days and forty nights; he did neither eat bread, nor drink water. And he wrote upon the tables the words of the covenant, the ten commandments.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ወረደ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ እምደብረ ፡ ሲና ፡ ወሀለዋ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ጽላት ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊሁ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወእንዘ ፡ ይወርድ
                  ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወኢያእመረ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ከመ ፡ ተሰብሐ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ገጹ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይትናገር ፡ ምስለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And when Moses went down from the mountain, there were the two tables in the hands of Moses,—as then he went down from the mountain, Moses knew not that the appearance of the skin of his face was glorified, when God spoke to him.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when Moses came down from mount Sinai with the two tables of testimony in Moses’ hand, when he came down from the mount, that Moses wist not that the skin of his face shone while he talked with him.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእይዎ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ከመ ፡ ተሰብሐ ፡ ርእየተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ፈርሁ
                  ፡ ቀሪቦቶ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron and all the elders of Israel saw Moses, and the appearance of the skin of his face was made glorious, and they feared to approach him.
translations.kjv: And when Aaron and all the children of Israel saw Moses, behold, the skin of his face shone; and they were afraid to come nigh him.

verses.geez: ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወገብኡ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ መኳንንተ ፡ ተዕይንት ፡ ወነገሮሙ ፡ ሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses called them, and Aaron and all the rulers of the synagogue turned towards him, and Moses spoke to them.
translations.kjv: And Moses called unto them; and Aaron and all the rulers of the congregation returned unto him: and Moses talked with them.

verses.geez:
ወእምድኅረ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ቀርቡ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወአዘዞሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘነገሮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  በደብረ ፡ ሱና ።

translations.lxx: And afterwards all the children of Israel came to him, and he commanded them all things, whatsoever the Lord had commanded him in the mount of Sina.
translations.kjv: And afterward all the children of Israel came nigh: and he gave them in commandment all that the LORD had spoken with him in mount Sinai.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ አኅለቀ ፡ ተናግሮቶሙ ፡ ወደየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ግልባቤ ፡ በዘ ፡ ይሴውር ፡ ገጾ ።

translations.lxx: And when he ceased speaking to them, he put a veil on his face.
translations.kjv: And till Moses had done speaking with them, he put a vail on his face.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ የሐውር ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትናገሮ ፡ ያሴስል ፡ ግልባቤሁ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይወፅእ ፡
                  ወእምከመ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ ይነግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And whenever Moses went in before the Lord to speak to him, he took off the veil till he went out, and he went forth and spoke to all the children of Israel whatsoever the Lord commanded him.
translations.kjv: But when Moses went in before the LORD to speak with him, he took the vail off, until he came out. And he came out, and spake unto the children of Israel that which he was commanded.

verses.geez:
ወርእዩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ ተሰብሐ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ወደየ ፡ ግልባቤ ፡ በዘ ፡ ይሴወር ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ ይ[በው]እ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትናገሮ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel saw the face of Moses, that it was glorified; and Moses put the veil over his face, till he went in to speak with him.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel saw the face of Moses, that the skin of Moses’ face shone: and Moses put the vail upon his face again, until he went in to speak with him.
